questionHtml: By systematically varying the value of b, or otherwise, find the two values of b such that the curve y=x3+3x2+b has exactly two x-axis intercepts.
markschemeHtml:
varies the value of b with a=3                    (M1)

Note: The (M1) in part (a) can also be awarded for a correct answer to either part (b)(i) or (b)(ii). Award (M1) for evidence that b=0 case is considered/determined.

b=-4, 0                    A1

[2 marks]

meta.title: By systematically varying the value of b, or otherwise, find the two values of b such that the curve y=x3+3x2+b has exactly two x-axis intercepts.
